person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
écu Équestre à droite ; heaume à timbre plat et à nasal, écu de profil, à armature visible.
Légende théorique
SIGILL ALEXAN // DRI FRIS DVCIS // BVRGVND'
Légende transcrite
Sigillum Alexandri, fratris ducis Burgundie.
Confirmation par Alexandre de Bourgogne, frère de Eudes III de Bourgogne, de la création et des privilèges de la commune de Dijon instituée par Hugues III, son père.
relevé JPR Teyssier Chalancon Mangas

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexandre de Bourgogne於1169年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o可倫比時，他的父親Hugues III de Bourgogne21歲，母親Alix de Lorraine24歲。他於1190年與Béatrix de Rion在法國利姆辛可斯蒙塔吉耀奧結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1205年9月6日在他的家鄉享年36歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易沙吉盧-勒朗斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexandre de Bourgogne于1169年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o可倫比时，他的父亲Hugues III de Bourgogne21岁，母亲Alix de Lorraine24岁。他于1190年与Béatrix de Rion在法国利姆辛可斯蒙塔吉耀奧结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1205年9月6日在他的家乡享年36岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易沙吉盧-勒朗斯。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Alexandre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexandre de Bourgogne was born in 1169, in Colombier, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Hugues III de Bourgogne, was 21 and his mother, Alix de Lorraine, was 24. He married Béatrix de Rion in 1190, in Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 6 September 1205, in his hometown, at the age of 36, and was buried in Saint-Loup-Géanges, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexandre de Bourgogne est né en 1169, à Colombier, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Hugues III de Bourgogne, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Alix de Lorraine, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Béatrix de Rion en 1190, à Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 6 septembre 1205, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Loup-Géanges, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexandre de Bourgogne 1169 in Colombier, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues III de Bourgogne 21 und seine Mutter Alix de Lorraine 24. Er hat 1190 in Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, Frankreich Béatrix de Rion geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 6. September 1205 im Alter von 36 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Saint-Loup-Géanges, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexandre de Bourgogne è nato il nel 1169 nel Colombier, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues III de Bourgogne, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Alix de Lorraine, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Béatrix de Rion nel 1190, nel Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 6 settembre 1205, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Loup-Géanges, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexandre de Bourgogneが1169年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeハウテ-サoンコロンビエルで生まれた時，父Hugues III de Bourgogneは21歳，母Alix de Lorraineは24歳であった。1190年にフランスリモウシンクレウゼモンタグイラウメでBéatrix de Rionと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1205年9月6日に故郷で36歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーサイント-ロウプ-グeアンジェズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexandre de Bourgogne(이)가 1169년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 하테-사o니 콜롬비어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues III de Bourgogne(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix de Lorraine(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1190년 프랑스 리모우신 크레우스 몽아길로에서 Béatrix de Rion(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1205년 9월 6일 그의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 세인트-루p-그e아그스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexandre de Bourgogne nasceu em 1169, em Colombier, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Hugues III de Bourgogne, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Lorraine, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Béatrix de Rion em 1190, em Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de setembro de 1205, em sua cidade natal, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Loup-Géanges, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexandre de Bourgogne родился в 1169 г. в местности коломбиир, хауте-саoн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues III de Bourgogne было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Alix de Lorraine, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Béatrix de Rion в 1190 г. в местности монтагуиллаюм, креус, лимусин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 6 сентября 1205 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-лоуп-гeангесь, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexandre de Bourgogne nació en 1169, en Colombier, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Hugues III de Bourgogne, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Alix de Lorraine, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Béatrix de Rion en 1190, en Montaguillaume, Creuse, Limousin, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 6 de septiembre de 1205, en su pueblo, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Loup-Géanges, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
